wmic.exe

Legacy Windows command-line utility for interacting with Windows Management Instrumentation (WMI). It was commonly used to query system information and perform local or remote administrative tasks, including process execution. wmic.exe was deprecated and disabled by default starting in Windows 11 (2024) and has been replaced by PowerShell CIM cmdlets (e.g., Get-CimInstance, Invoke-CimMethod, New-CimSession).

Execute Command On The Target

wmic /node:192.168.50.73 /user:jen /password:Nexus123! process call create "calc"
